name: coral-music-desktop
description: 珊瑚音乐 - 基于 Electron、React、MobX、Vite、TypeScript 与 Ant Design 的桌面音乐播放器

scripts.pack:win: node build-config/pack.js && npm run pack:win:setup:x64 && npm run pack:win:setup:x86 && npm run pack:win:setup:arm64 && npm run pack:win:setup:x86_64 && npm run pack:win:7z
scripts.pack:win:portable: npm run pack:win:portable:x86_64 && npm run pack:win:portable:x64 && npm run pack:win:portable:x86
scripts.pack:linux: node build-config/pack.js && npm run pack:linux:deb && npm run pack:linux:appImage && npm run pack:linux:rpm && npm run pack:linux:pacman
scripts.pack:linux:deb: npm run pack:linux:deb:amd64 && npm run pack:linux:deb:arm64 && npm run pack:linux:deb:armv7l
scripts.pack:mac: node build-config/pack.js && npm run pack:mac:dmg && npm run pack:mac:dmg:arm64
scripts.publish:win:setup:x64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x64 type=setup publish=always
scripts.publish:win:setup:x86: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x86 type=setup publish=always
scripts.publish:win:setup:arm64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=arm64 type=setup publish=always
scripts.publish:win:setup:x86_64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x86_64 type=setup publish=always
scripts.publish:win:portable: npm run publish:win:portable:x86_64 && npm run publish:win:portable:x64 && npm run publish:win:portable:x86
scripts.publish:win:portable:x86_64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x86_64 type=portable publish=always
scripts.publish:win:portable:x64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x64 type=portable publish=always
scripts.publish:win:portable:x86: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x86 type=portable publish=always
scripts.publish:win:7z:x64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x64 type=green publish=always
scripts.publish:win:7z:arm64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=arm64 type=green publish=always
scripts.publish:win7:setup:x64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x64 type=win7_setup publish=always
scripts.publish:win7:7z:x64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x64 type=win7_green publish=always
scripts.publish:win7:7z:x86: node build-config/build-pack.js target=win arch=x86 type=win7_green publish=always
scripts.publish:mac:dmg: node build-config/build-pack.js target=mac arch=x64 type=dmg publish=always
scripts.publish:mac:dmg:arm64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=mac arch=arm64 type=dmg publish=always
scripts.publish:linux:deb:amd64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=linux arch=x64 type=deb publish=always
scripts.publish:linux:deb:arm64: node build-config/build-pack.js target=linux arch=arm64 type=deb publish=always
scripts.publish:linux:deb:armv7l: node build-config/build-pack.js target=linux arch=armv7l type=deb publish=always
scripts.publish:linux:appImage: node build-config/build-pack.js target=linux arch=x64 type=appImage publish=always
scripts.publish:linux:rpm: node build-config/build-pack.js target=linux arch=x64 type=rpm publish=always
scripts.publish:linux:pacman: node build-config/build-pack.js target=linux arch=x64 type=pacman publish=always
scripts.smoke:release: npm run smoke:migration && npm run smoke:package && npm run smoke:bundle && npm run smoke:playback-capabilities && npm run typecheck:react
scripts.smoke:full: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run smoke:release && npm run smoke:dist
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.jsx -f node_modules/eslint-formatter-friendly --fix vite.config.ts src/renderer-react src/lyric-react src/shared build-config
scripts.lint: npm run check-type && npm run lint:es && npm run lint:style && npm run lint:prettier || exit 1
scripts.fix: npm run fix:es && npm run fix:style && npm run fix:prettier || exit 1
scripts.build:react: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:renderer-lyric
